title: Jaxolotl (Blue Axolotl -> Jax)
description: A simple skin of the Blue Axolotl to the Jumbo Jax Plush from the The Amazing Digital Circus store!
body:
Replace the blue (or others) axolotl with a recreation of the [Jumbo Jax Plushie](https://glitchproductions.store/products/jumbo-jax-plush)! I dont have it in real life so I took some creative liberties, I also gave him his tail.

With a mod called [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) you can also toggle the replacement of other variants of axolotl! If you toggle them all on then you'll never need to see an axolotl again!

On versions older then 1.20.2 it shows as outdated but it should work on any version above 1.17 because thats when the axolotl was added.
